caption:
New cafe alert! 💛 It’s not just aesthetically pleasing but affordable too. 

📍 Ibric, Al Jalila Foundation, Dubai Healthcare City
☕️ Drinks start at 10 AED onwards. My Pretty in Pink Matcha costs 23.
🥐 Pastries and sandwiches are reasonably priced.

Tag your coffee date!

transcription.text: I'm feeling so good, at a back party We don't have to talk, I know that you want me Gotta keep it nice, we cannot be naughty We could get drinks, or we could get coffee Feeling so good
